description: From the manufacturer Powering Everything You Need The extension cord range, designed to be powered up. From surge-protected cables to individually switched options, USB-equipped cords, and long extension cables, we offer a diverse selection to meet your every need. Our surge-protected cables provide peace of mind against power surges, safeguarding your valuable electronics at home, in the workplace, or in student dorms. Individually switched cables offer customizable power control, allowing you to easily manage multiple devices without unplugging them. With USB-equipped cords, charging your smartphones, tablets, and other USB-powered devices is a breeze, making them perfect for students juggling assignments and home office setups. Whether you're working, studying, or relaxing, our extension cord range ensures you stay powered up and connected with ease Status Multi Plug USB Extension Cable Innovative Desk Grip: Easy mounting onto desk edges, providing convenient access. Versatile Charging: Features two plug sockets to accommodate multiple devices simultaneously. USB Powered: Equipped with a USB-A input and a USB-C input, allowing you to charge multiple devices. Space-saving design: Perfect for decluttering your workspace and keeping cables neatly organized. For Home, Offices, and Study Areas: Providing accessible power and charging solutions. Features Convenient Desk Grip Introducing our Multi-Plug USB Extension Cable. A versatile solution for all your charging needs, with multiple USB ports and plug sockets, it allows you to charge multiple devices simultaneously. The desk grip feature adds an extra layer of convenience, securely attaching the multiplug to the edge of your desk or table. Whether you're working at your desk, studying in your dorm room, or relaxing at home, the USB multiplug keeps your devices powered up and organized, making it an essential accessory for modern living. Individually Switched Unparalleled convenience and control over your power usage. Each socket has a switch, allowing you to turn devices on and off independently. This innovative feature reduces energy consumption and eliminates the hassle of unplugging devices when they're not in use. If you're managing multiple electronics in your home office, studio, or entertainment center, our individually switched sockets provide customizable power management to suit your needs. With the ability to control each device separately, you'll enjoy greater flexibility and efficiency in your daily tasks, making this extension cable a must-have accessory for any modern workspace or household. Surge Protection Experience peace of mind with our surge-protected extension cables. Designed to safeguard your valuable electronics from unexpected power surges. Equipped with advanced surge protection technology, this extension cable provides an additional layer of defence against voltage fluctuations and electrical spikes. When you're working on important projects in your home office, streaming your favorite shows, or charging your devices, you can trust our surge-protected extension cable to keep your electronics safe and secure. With its reliable surge protection feature, you can rest assured that your devices are shielded from potential damage, making it a great addition to any workspace or living area. Status Desk Cube The ultimate space-saving solution for powering up your workstation. Equipped with USB inputs alongside standard plug outputs, the Desk Cube offers versatile charging options for all your electronic devices. Its sleek and modern design makes it a stylish addition to any desk or workspace, while its compact size allows for easy placement and portability. With the Status Desk Cube, you can streamline your workspace and keep your devices powered up and protected at all times. 8-Socket Extension The 8-socket extension cable, the ultimate power solution for your home or office. With individual switches for each socket, you have complete control over which devices are powered on, helping you save energy and reduce standby power consumption. With surge protection, ensure your valuable electronics are shielded from voltage spikes and electrical fluctuations, providing peace of mind. Suppose you're setting up a home entertainment centre, powering multiple workstations, or organizing a cluttered office space. In that case, our 8-socket extension cable offers unmatched convenience and versatility to meet all your power needs. Built to Last Well-built cables and durable, long-lasting extension cords. Crafted from high-quality plastics and engineered for durability, our cables are built to withstand the rigours of daily use, providing reliable power and connectivity. While you power up your home entertainment system, set up a workstation in your office, and tackle projects in the yard, our extension cords are strong and ready to take on any task. With their robust design, you can trust our cables to deliver consistent performance for years to come, making them a smart investment for any home or workplace.
